factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Scavenger
uniqueTraits.text: When Maxen knocks out an enemy champion, remove their banner from the battlefield.

ultimate.name: Bird Shot
ultimate.text: Remove up to 3 Gearhawks from the battlefield. This skill has +2 {accuracy_die} and +2 {damage_die} for each Gearhawk removed.

plotSkills.name: Tinker
plotSkills.text: The Gearhawks may immediately make a recruit action and may gain a boon of your choice.

clashSkills.name: Piercing Round
clashSkills.text: This skill has -1 {accuracy_die} for each hex between Maxen and his target. Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.

clashSkills.name: Shrapnel Shot
clashSkills.text: This skill has -1 {accuracy_die} and -1 {damage_die} for each hex between Maxen and his target. Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex away from Maxen.

traits.name: Eagle Eye
traits.text: At the end of the Gearhawks' activation, you may choose a friendly champion adjacent to a Gearhawk model. That friendly champion gains {accuracy_die_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Migration
plotSkills.text: You may place each Gearhawk up to 3 hexes from its current hex.

plotSkills.name: Talon Rake
plotSkills.text: This skill gains +1 {accuracy_die} for each Gearhawk adjacent to the target. Hit Effect: Inflict {protection_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Migration
clashSkills.text: You may place each Gearhawk up to 3 hexes from its current hex.

clashSkills.name: Dive Bomb
clashSkills.text: This skill gains +1 {accuracy_die} for each Gearhawk adjacent to the target.
